title: Notifications - Device disconnected OFF
scenario: No "Device is disconnected" notification appears when the notification toggle is disabled in Poly Lens Menu > General > Notifications & Device Alerts
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
3. Tap the Poly Lens Menu (hamburger menu or gear icon).
4. Go to General → Notifications & Device Alerts.
5. Locate the 'Device Disconnected' notification toggle and turn it OFF.
6. Ensure a Poly Bluetooth headset is currently connected to the mobile device.
7. Disconnect the headset (e.g., turn off the headset, move out of range, or disable Bluetooth on the phone).
8. Observe the device's notification shade for any 'Device is disconnected' notification.
expected: No 'Device is disconnected' notification appears in the notification shade after the headset disconnects.
